enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request about transgender bathrooms, arguing that transgender individuals who have fully transitioned should be allowed to use the bathroom matching their gender identity. He criticizes a Republican congressman's argument that trans women should use men's facilities, calling it effectively equivalent to forcing women to shower with men. He also briefly addresses religious counterarguments, dismisses them as inconsistent, and advocates for one-on-one Skype debates to change minds on the issue.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Trans people who have fully transitioned should use the bathroom matching their gender identity
Forcing trans women into men's facilities is effectively sexual assault under a veneer of propriety
Religious opposition is inconsistent and unconvincing
One-on-one public Skype debates would expose opponents as illogical and help change minds
